title: Glass Scriptorium
public_claim: First "proper handoff zip" for the Glass Scriptorium — a MuranoOS room that is not a note page but a persistent narrative operating environment combining curriculum/canon, active storytelling project work, exemplar study, revision intelligence, provenance discipline, and public-safe/teaching-safe export generation.
distinctive_mechanism: , state the backend/frontend or packet components, and decide whether the handoff is ready for engineering, public explanation, or archival retention
use_value: It treats expression as an instrument with audience, warrant, cadence, and rhetorical-risk controls rather than as decorative prose.
